name: io.github.constripacity/claude-code-bridge
description: MCP relay so Claude Code agents on different machines can exchange messages via named channels.

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_BRIDGE_DB
environmentVariables.description: SQLite database path (default: ./claude-bridge.db). Share the same path across HTTP and stdio instances to share state.

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_BRIDGE_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Bearer token. Only applies to HTTP mode (not stdio). When set, requires Authorization: Bearer <token> on all endpoints except /status.
